summary: Comprehensive testing of Dominican Republic POS system completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (17/17 tests passed). Frontend login, main navigation, and most UI components working correctly. Identified one critical issue with table-to-order navigation that needs fixing.

critical_bugs.issue: Clicking on tables in table map doesn't navigate to order screen - stays on /tables URL
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core POS workflow - waiters cannot create orders

ui_bugs.issue: Table click handler not properly triggering navigation to /order/:tableId

passed_tests: Backend API: PIN Login (Carlos - 1234)
Backend API: Get Areas (Salon Principal, Terraza, Bar, VIP)
Backend API: Get Tables (21 tables across 4 areas)
Backend API: Get Categories (7 categories)
Backend API: Get Products (29 products with modifiers)
Backend API: Create Order workflow
Backend API: Send to Kitchen workflow
Backend API: Kitchen orders management
Backend API: Create Bill with ITBIS 18% and NCF
Backend API: Payment processing (cash/card)
Backend API: Cancellation reasons (7 reasons)
Backend API: Cash register/shifts management
Frontend UI: PIN login page and authentication
Frontend UI: Table map loads with all 4 areas
Frontend UI: Area tabs navigation (Salon Principal, Terraza, Bar, VIP)
Frontend UI: Kitchen page shows orders and items
Frontend UI: Kitchen item status progression
Frontend UI: Cash register page with shift management
Frontend UI: Settings page with all tabs (areas, tables, reasons, products)
Frontend UI: Main navigation between pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical table click navigation issue: DraggableTable click handler in TableMap.js is not properly navigating to order screen. The handleTableClick function is called but navigation to /order/{tableId} is failing. Check React Router navigation logic and ensure onClick event isn't being prevented by drag handlers.
